mapper.select:
SELECT USER_ID AS USER_ID , USER_NM AS USER_NM , USER_NM_ENG AS USER_NM_ENG , PASSWORD AS PASSWORD , EMAIL AS EMAIL , TEL_NUM AS TEL_NUM , CELL_NUM AS CELL_NUM , FAX_NUM AS FAX_NUM , LANG_CD , COUNTRY_CD , COMPANY_CD , GMT_CD , USER_DATE_FORMAT_CD , USER_NUMBER_FORMAT_CD , POSITION_NM , DUTY_NM , PW_RESET_FLAG
, (CASE WHEN PW_RESET_DATE <= SYSDATE - 90 THEN 'N' WHEN PW_RESET_DATE IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS RESET_VALIDATE_FLAG
, (CASE WHEN PW_RESET_DATE <= DATEADD(dd,-90,SYSDATE) THEN 'N' WHEN PW_RESET_DATE IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS RESET_VALIDATE_FLAG
FROM STOCUSER WHERE USER_ID = #{ses.userId} AND GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND PASSWORD = #{P_PASSWORD}

SELECT CVUR.GATE_CD , CVUR.USER_NM AS USER_NM , CVUR.USER_NM AS USER_NM_ENG , CVUR.PASSWORD AS PASSWORD , CVUR.EMAIL AS EMAIL , CVUR.TEL_NUM AS TEL_NUM , CVUR.CELL_NUM AS CELL_NUM , CVUR.FAX_NUM AS FAX_NUM , 'KO' AS LANG_CD , 'KR' AS COUNTRY_CD , 'GMT+09:00' AS GMT_CD , '01' AS USER_DATE_FORMAT_CD , '01' AS USER_NUMBER_FORMAT_CD , CVUR.POSITION_NM , CVUR.DUTY_NM AS DUTY_NM , CVUR.PW_RESET_FLAG , (CASE WHEN CVUR.PW_RESET_DATE <= SYSDATE - 90 THEN 'N' WHEN CVUR.PW_RESET_DATE IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS RESET_VALIDATE_FLAG , UPPER(SF_TRIM( CVUR.USER_ID )) AS USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(CVUR.GATE_CD, CVUR.MOD_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) ' / ' (CVUR.MOD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS MOD_INFO , getUserName(CVUR.GATE_CD, CVUR.CHIEF_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CHIEF_USER_NM , CVUR.CHIEF_USER_ID AS CHIEF_USER_ID FROM STOCCVUR CVUR WHERE CVUR.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CVUR.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CVUR.USER_ID = #{ses.userId}
AND CVUR.PASSWORD = #{P_PASSWORD}
